stemHtml: After following a TCAS RA manoeuvre, why should the pilot notify ATC?

options.a: CPDLC provides the information automatically — notification can be delayed.
options.b: For legal documentation of the serious incident.
options.c: ATC needs to check if the aircraft should return to its clearance.
options.d: Only the pilot knows when ACAS issues RAs — ATC must be informed.
